sentences.target: On détermine la cause du bruit.

translations.fr: On détermine la cause du bruit.
translations.en: We’re figuring out the cause of the noise.
translations.es: Estamos averiguando la causa del ruido.
translations.de: Wir finden die Ursache des Geräuschs heraus.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando la causa del rumore.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在查找噪音的原因。
translations.yue: 我哋正喺度搵噪音嘅原因。
translations.pt: Estamos descobrindo a causa do barulho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm nguyên nhân của tiếng ồn.
translations.nl: We zoeken de oorzaak van het lawaai.
translations.hi: हम शोर के कारण का पता लगा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi finner ut årsaken til støyen.
translations.sv: Vi tar reda på orsaken till oljudet.
translations.ja: 騒音の原因を調べています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (indefinite, often used for ‘we’ in speech); 3rd person singular syntactically.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive action of determining.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun ‘cause’.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP (‘la cause’).
Contraction of ‘de + le’; preposition ‘de’ introducing the nominal complement (‘bruit’) of ‘cause’.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the noun ‘cause’ governed by ‘du’.

sentences.target: Je veux déterminer notre budget ce mois-ci.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø detɛʁmine nɔtʁ bydʒɛ sə mwasi/

translations.fr: Je veux déterminer notre budget ce mois-ci.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø detɛʁmine nɔtʁ bydʒɛ sə mwasi/
translations.en: I want to determine our budget this month.
translations.es: Quiero fijar nuestro presupuesto para este mes.
translations.de: Ich möchte unser Budget für diesen Monat festlegen.
translations.it: Voglio stabilire il nostro budget per questo mese.
translations.ko: 이번 달 우리 예산을 정하고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想制定我们这个月的预算。
translations.yue: 我想定好我哋今個月嘅預算。
translations.ru: Я хочу определить наш бюджет на этот месяц.
translations.pt: Quero definir nosso orçamento para este mês.
translations.he: אני רוצה לקבוע את התקציב שלנו לחודש הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn xác định ngân sách của chúng ta cho tháng này.
translations.nl: Ik wil ons budget voor deze maand vaststellen.
translations.uk: Я хочу визначити наш бюджет на цей місяць.
translations.hu: Meg akarom határozni a költségvetésünket erre a hónapra.
translations.hi: मैं इस महीने का हमारा बजट तय करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę ustalić nasz budżet na ten miesiąc.
translations.el: Θέλω να καθορίσω τον προϋπολογισμό μας για αυτόν τον μήνα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil bestemme budsjettet vårt for denne måneden.
translations.id: Saya ingin menentukan anggaran kita bulan ini.
translations.sv: Jag vill fastställa vår budget för den här månaden.
translations.ro: Vreau să stabilim bugetul nostru pentru luna aceasta.
translations.cs: Chci stanovit náš rozpočet na tento měsíc.
translations.da: Jeg vil fastsætte vores budget for denne måned.
translations.ja: 今月の予算を決めたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; modal-like verb selecting an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘veux’ (verb of volition).
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; modifies ‘budget’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘déterminer’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; introduces ‘mois’ in the deictic expression.
Common noun, masculine; head of the NP ‘ce mois-ci’ functioning as a temporal modifier.
Deictic adverb attached to the noun via hyphen in the construction ‘ce …-ci’, specifying ‘this (month)’.

sentences.target: Ils déterminent l'ordre des jeux pour demain.
sentences.reading: /il detɛʁmin lɔʁdʁ de ʒø puʁ dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils déterminent l'ordre des jeux pour demain.
translations.ipa: /il detɛʁmin lɔʁdʁ de ʒø puʁ dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: They are deciding the order of the games for tomorrow.
translations.es: Están decidiendo el orden de los juegos para mañana.
translations.de: Sie legen die Reihenfolge der Spiele für morgen fest.
translations.it: Stanno decidendo l'ordine dei giochi per domani.
translations.ko: 그들은 내일 게임들의 순서를 정하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在决定明天游戏的顺序。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度決定聽日啲遊戲嘅次序。
translations.ru: Они определяют порядок игр на завтра.
translations.pt: Eles estão decidindo a ordem dos jogos para amanhã.
translations.he: הם מחליטים על סדר המשחקים למחר.
translations.vi: Họ đang quyết định thứ tự các trò chơi cho ngày mai.
translations.ar: هم يقررون ترتيب الألعاب ليوم الغد.
translations.nl: Ze bepalen de volgorde van de spellen voor morgen.
translations.uk: Вони визначають порядок ігор на завтра.
translations.hu: A holnapi játékok sorrendjét határozzák meg.
translations.hi: वे कल के खेलों का क्रम तय कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αποφασίζουν τη σειρά των παιχνιδιών για αύριο.
translations.nb: De bestemmer rekkefølgen på spillene for i morgen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menentukan urutan permainan untuk besok.
translations.sv: De bestämmer ordningen på spelen till i morgon.
translations.ro: Ei stabilesc ordinea jocurilor pentru mâine.
translations.da: De beslutter rækkefølgen på spillene til i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼らは明日のゲームの順番を決めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person masculine plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Definite article elided before vowel (‘le’ → ‘l’’); introduces ‘ordre’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘déterminent’. Takes a nominal complement ‘des jeux’.
Contraction of ‘de + les’; preposition ‘de’ introducing the complement noun ‘jeux’ of ‘ordre’.
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of the noun ‘ordre’ governed by ‘des’.
Preposition; introduces the temporal PP ‘pour demain’ indicating planned time.
Temporal adverb; complements the clause by specifying the time frame.

sentences.target: Nous déterminons la meilleure route maintenant.

translations.fr: Nous déterminons la meilleure route maintenant.
translations.en: We’re determining the best route now.
translations.es: Ahora estamos decidiendo la mejor ruta.
translations.de: Wir bestimmen jetzt die beste Route.
translations.it: Stiamo decidendo adesso il percorso migliore.
translations.ko: 지금 가장 좋은 경로를 정하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在正在确定最佳路线。
translations.yue: 我哋而家揀緊最好嘅路線。
translations.pt: Agora estamos escolhendo a melhor rota.
translations.he: אנחנו קובעים עכשיו את המסלול הטוב ביותר.
translations.tr: Şu anda en iyi rotayı belirliyoruz.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng tôi đang chọn lộ trình tốt nhất.
translations.nl: We bepalen nu de beste route.
translations.hi: हम अभी सबसे अच्छा मार्ग चुन रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi bestemmer den beste ruten nå.
translations.sv: Nu bestämmer vi den bästa rutten.
translations.ro: Acum stabilim cel mai bun traseu.
translations.da: Nu vælger vi den bedste rute.
translations.ja: 今、最適なルートを決めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces ‘meilleure route’.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies ‘route’ (with definite article, yields a superlative reading: ‘the best route’).
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘déterminons’.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause, indicating the present moment.
